languages.text: "Послушайте, это отличный препарат, я сам его готовил. Да, у него не мгновенный эффект, просто продолжайте прием!"

traits.locale_text: "Послушайте, это отличный препарат, я сам его готовил. Да, у него не мгновенный эффект, просто продолжайте прием!"

languages.text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"
languages.original_text: "Послушайте, это отличный препарат, я сам его готовил. Да, у него не мгновенный эффект, просто продолжайте прием!"

traits.locale_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"
"Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"
"Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

languages.text: 「ほら、これは素晴らしい薬よ、私が自分で作ったの。そう、すぐに効くものではないわ、彼女には飲み続けるだけなの！」
languages.original_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

languages.text: "Bakın, bu mükemmel bir ilaç. Kendim hazırladım. Evet, anında etki etmez. Kızınızın ilacı almaya devam etmesi gerekiyor!"
languages.original_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

traits.locale_text: "Bakın, bu mükemmel bir ilaç. Kendim hazırladım. Evet, anında etki etmez. Kızınızın ilacı almaya devam etmesi gerekiyor!"

languages.text: “听着，这可是上好的药剂，我亲手调制的。虽然不能立竿见影，但只要坚持服用，一定会见效！”
languages.original_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

traits.locale_text: “听着，这可是上好的药剂，我亲手调制的。虽然不能立竿见影，但只要坚持服用，一定会见效！”

languages.text: "Hey, das ist eine ausgezeichnete Medizin. Ich habe sie selbst zubereitet. Ja, sie wirkt nicht sofort. Sie muss sie einfach weiternehmen!"
languages.original_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

traits.locale_text: "Hey, das ist eine ausgezeichnete Medizin. Ich habe sie selbst zubereitet. Ja, sie wirkt nicht sofort. Sie muss sie einfach weiternehmen!"

languages.text: « Écoutez, c'est un remède très efficace. Je l'ai préparé moi-même. Oui, l'effet n'est pas immédiat, mais il faut le prendre sur la durée ! »
languages.original_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

traits.locale_text: « Écoutez, c'est un remède très efficace. Je l'ai préparé moi-même. Oui, l'effet n'est pas immédiat, mais il faut le prendre sur la durée ! »

languages.text: «La medicina es excelente, la preparé personalmente. Es cierto que los efectos no son inmediatos, ¡pero debe seguir tomándosela!».
languages.original_text: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"

traits.locale_text: «La medicina es excelente, la preparé personalmente. Es cierto que los efectos no son inmediatos, ¡pero debe seguir tomándosela!».
